title.purpose: Case identity and decisive end states.

label.purpose: Codes, state, timestamps, and compact metadata only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: One decisive action per decision group.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 46px; padding: 11px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(0.72 0.14 70); color: oklch(0.09 0 0); font: 700 16px/1.2 system-ui; transition: background 180ms, transform 180ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.86 0.08 78); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.84 0.12 190); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 46px; padding: 11px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.43 0.022 225); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(0.21 0.016 240); color: oklch(0.94 0.012 190); font: 700 16px/1.2 system-ui; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.25 0.018 240); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.84 0.12 190); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Evidence Status
components.css: .ds-evidence-status { display: inline-flex; padding: 4px 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(0.32 0.07 190); color: oklch(0.78 0.11 190); font: 650 11px/1.4 ui-monospace, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.055em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Choice Row
components.description: A direct verb with method and known consequence.
components.css: .ds-choice { width: 100%; min-height: 100px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr 24px; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 18px 12px; color: oklch(0.94 0.012 190); background: transparent; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.32 0.018 230); text-align: left; } .ds-choice:hover { background: oklch(0.16 0.012 240); } .ds-choice:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.84 0.12 190); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-choice-label { color: oklch(0.72 0.14 70); font: 650 11px/1.4 ui-monospace, monospace; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-choice strong, .ds-choice small { display: block; } .ds-choice small { margin-top: 7px; color: oklch(0.72 0.018 210); }

components.name: Case Rail Tabs
components.description: Stable navigation among case state, evidence, and events.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); background: oklch(0.16 0.012 240); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.32 0.018 230); } .ds-tabs button { min-height: 48px; border: 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.72 0.018 210); font: 700 12px/1 system-ui; } .ds-tabs button:hover { color: oklch(0.94 0.012 190); } .ds-tabs button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.84 0.12 190); outline-offset: -3px; } .ds-tabs .is-active { color: oklch(0.94 0.012 190); border-bottom-color: oklch(0.72 0.14 70); }

narrative.overview: The interface behaves like a municipal case terminal embedded in a rain-dark public archive: measured, legible, and under quiet pressure. Atmosphere comes from decisive imagery, tonal layers, sparse status signals, and precise copy—not simulated CRT damage or decorative data noise.
keyCharacteristics: Neutral black architecture with restrained civic color signals.
Dense information that opens progressively instead of appearing as a wall.
System typography for immediate trust; mono is limited to codes, timestamps, and short state labels.
Fast state transitions that always communicate cause and effect.
One image-led world view balanced by readable authored evidence.

rules.name: The Signal Has Meaning Rule
rules.body: Amber is action, cyan is verified state, and coral is risk; never swap them for decoration.

rules.name: The Record Before Atmosphere Rule
rules.body: Narrative text stays readable at normal body size; visual flavor never compresses essential testimony into tiny type.

rules.name: The Flat Record Rule
rules.body: Surfaces remain flat until interaction or stacking requires separation.

dos: Do target WCAG 2.2 AA and use Record White for all essential copy on Night or Concrete.
Do keep controls at least 44px tall and fully operable by keyboard, pointer, and touch.
Do show the cause of every trust, access, evidence, and alarm change in the event log.
donts: Don't use generic neon-cyberpunk spectacle or purple-magenta synthwave.
Don't use generic dashboard card grids, decorative glassmorphism, gradient text, side-stripe accents, or repeated tiny uppercase section eyebrows.
Don't use good-versus-evil morality meters or label an ending as morally correct.
